content: Resend batch emails API allows up to 100 emails per single API call via POST to /emails/batch. Rate limit: 2 requests/second. Attachments and scheduled_at are NOT supported for batch. Idempotency-Key header (256 char max, 24hr expiry) prevents duplicate sends. For digest sending: chunk user list into batches of 100, process sequentially with ~500ms delay between batches to respect the 2 req/sec limit. Next.js integration via resend.emails.send() in Server Actions or route handlers. The react property accepts React components for email bodies.
